description: Per-app layout configuration. Defines the sidebar navigation, hero area, and card arrangement for each app's dashboard shell.

shellSpec.topLeft: App logo + name (heading font, bold) + subtitle + highlight stats paragraph
shellSpec.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar. Collapses to icons on smaller screens, expands on hover to drawer, hamburger on mobile. Grouped nav items with section labels.
shellSpec.heroArea: Below the title block. Can be transparent (matches page bg) or dark standout card. Contains key stats, latest activity, or call-to-action.
shellSpec.rightCard: Optional card pinned to the right of the hero area. Quick take, summary, or spotlight content.
shellSpec.cardGrid: Below the hero. 2-3 column responsive grid of Feature Cards and Stat Pills following the Card Visual Hierarchy system.
